shellCommands.command:
mv middleware.ts proxy.ts && python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('proxy.ts')
s=p.read_text().replace('export function middleware(', 'export function proxy(')
s=s.replace('Middleware runs', 'Proxy runs')
p.write_text(s)
PY
cat proxy.ts
npm run build
git status --short && git diff -- proxy.ts tsconfig.json
